message:
refactor(freeze): Convert runtime is_trampoline checks to compile-time branching

Fixed all runtime `if (is_trampoline)` checks in emitCommonOpcode that were
generating invalid C code with:
- `break` statements outside of loops/switches
- References to `frame->result` which doesn't exist in SSA mode

Changes:
- Added emitExceptionCheck() helper for JS_IsException checks
- Added emitErrorCheck() helper for error return checks
- Converted ~30 runtime checks to compile-time code generation
- Build now succeeds with frozen functions enabled

The Zig code now uses `if (is_trampoline)` to decide WHAT to write,
rather than writing `if (is_trampoline)` into the output C code.
